html:
Exclusive to:

Dreadstone WallDreadstone Wall Item

“Can be repaired using the inventory wall items.

Can be build up 4 levels.”

-for Structure

The Dreadstone Wall is a Wall exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It uses 4 Dreadstones to be crafted and its Blueprint drops from the Nightmare Werepig.

Despite being together with the Thulecite Wall, as both have 400 health when initially placed and a maximum health of 800 when fully upgraded, The Dreadstone Wall is the toughest of the walls. It takes 25 hits to tear down each segment with a Hammer, compared to 3 hits for many other walls and when attacked by a player, the wall takes only 75% of the player's damage output, damage received from mobs is not affected.

Unlike others walls the Dreadstone Wall is repaired by 100% its costs, meaning that each Dreadstone repairs it by 80 health, 4 Dreadstones being 320 health, the same as a fully crafted wall. It only requires 3 walls to reach its maximum height and health. When hammered, it will drop 2 Dreadstones if it's fully upgraded and 1 if it's not.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Reliquary Collection
Layered Dreadstone Wall
Like a cake, but horrible.

Trivia

  • The Dreadstone Wall was introduced in the Terrors Below update.

Dreadstone WallDreadstone Wall Item
“I feel so... safe?”
–Wilson
“Couldn't we have made walls out of literally anything else?”
–Willow
“Wall is mighty! And scary!”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing will ever break through.”
–Wendy
“MY FORTRESS OF EVIL”
–WX-78
“A highly secure wall.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not exactly cozy, eh?”
–Woodie
“Ah. Homey.”
–Maxwell
“These förtificatiöns will strike fear intö my enemies' hearts!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks kinda scary...”
–Webber
“A bit unsettling, non?”
–Warly
“Sparkly”
–Wormwood
“Well, at least it's sturdy.”
–Winona
“To keep you out, or keep me in?”
–Wortox
“Pretty wall!”
–Wurt
“Spooky!”
–Walter
“It's just a wall, nothing more than that.”
–Wanda
“What could go wrong?”
–Wilson
“Uuuuugh, building is so much wooork...”
–Willow
“Pile of scary rocks!”
–Wolfgang
“As dark and impenetrable as my heart.”
–Wendy
“PERFECTLY EVIL DEFENSES”
–WX-78
“The stone's density makes for an incredibly strong building material.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd rather build walls out of lumber.”
–Woodie
“I appreciate the finer things.”
–Maxwell
“Fashiöned fröm cursed stöne.”
–Wigfrid
“Do we have to build it?”
–Webber
“Oh dear, did I just hear it whisper?”
–Warly
“For the ground”
–Wormwood
“Assembly time.”
–Winona
“It's of no use there on the ground.”
–Wortox
“Will be good wall, florp.”
–Wurt
“It's gonna be a real nightmare to set it up! Get it?”
–Walter
“I'd better get it set up, no time to waste.”
–Wanda
“Can be repaired using the inventory wall items.
Can be build up 4 levels.”
-for Structure

Despite being together with the Thulecite Wall, as both have 400 health when initially placed and a maximum health of 800 when fully upgraded, The Dreadstone Wall is the toughest of the walls. It takes 25 hits to tear down each segment with a Hammer, compared to 3 hits for many other walls and when attacked by a player, the wall takes only 75% of the player's damage output, damage received from mobs is not affected.
Unlike others walls the Dreadstone Wall is repaired by 100% its costs, meaning that each Dreadstone repairs it by 80 health, 4 Dreadstones being 320 health, the same as a fully crafted wall. summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bức tường Dreadstone là Bức tường dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó sử dụng 4 Dreadstone để chế tạo và Bản thiết kế của nó rơi ra từ Lợn sói ác mộng.
